nasb.text: Corresponding to the number of years after the jubilee, you shall buy from your friend; he is to sell to you according to the number of years of crops.

esv.text: You shall pay your neighbor according to the number of years after the jubilee, and he shall sell to you according to the number of years for crops.

cnv.text: 你要按照下一個禧年以前還剩餘的年數向鄰舍買；他也要按照這年數可得的出產價值賣給你。

ccb.text: 买卖双方要按照距下个禧年的年数多少定价。
